mappings.rationaleAI: Historiography is the discipline devoted to studying and interpreting human history.
Historiography and the study of history is the direct academic subject matter of this article on history as a discipline.
Prehistory raises distinctive methodological challenges for historiography, relying on archaeology and anthropology rather than written records.
Ancient history established many foundational methods of historical inquiry and record-keeping still studied in historiography.
The concept of civilization itself is a key historiographical framework for organizing and interpreting the human past.
Ibn Khaldun's Muqaddimah pioneered the philosophy of history and is considered the first work of historiography as a discipline.
Archaeology is a primary method of historiography, recovering knowledge of the past through material evidence.
Military history is a major field within historiography and the study of history.
